alert.message: Connection pool exhausted on payments-api: 100% of the pool in use and requests queueing since the last deploy.

expected.summary: payments-api incident auto-remediated: the exhausted connection pool was remediated, verified resolved with a reference id; no human action required.

alert.message: Intermittent 500s observed on checkout, no clear pattern, cause unclear.

expected.summary: checkout incident escalated to the on-call responder because the diagnosis confidence was low; acknowledged.
